Vazirmatn
=========

Source: https://github.com/rastikerdar/vazirmatn
Version: v33.003
Files bundled in app/src/main/res/font:

- vazirmatn_ui_fd_regular.ttf
- vazirmatn_ui_fd_medium.ttf
- vazirmatn_ui_fd_semibold.ttf
- vazirmatn_ui_fd_bold.ttf

These files come from the `misc/UI-Farsi-Digits/fonts/ttf` package variant.
